title: Jujutsu Workspaces plugin configuration
description: Per-plugin (global) configuration for the jj-plugin. See change: add-jj-workspace-plugin.

defaultPushTarget.description: Where the fold-back skill pushes by default. `bookmark` is safer; `trunk` requires `allowDirectTrunkPush: true`.

workspaceRoot.description: Subdirectory (relative to the repo root) where new jj workspaces are created. The repo's .gitignore should usually exclude this path.

allowDirectTrunkPush.description: When false (recommended), the fold-back skill refuses to push to bookmarks named main/master/trunk.

showInitColocatedSuggestion.description: When false (default), the 'Enable jj workspaces' button is hidden on plain-git sessions. Flip to true to opt in to the colocated-init affordance.
